hero.title: Transform your
hero.description: We accompany your digital evolution step by step. From appointment management to complete medical records, we guide you through every stage of the process.

product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.subtitle: The most complete appointment management system in Argentina. Simplify your schedule, improve your patients' experience.
product.feature1Desc: Automatic sync with Google Calendar and WhatsApp reminders.
product.feature2Desc: Your patients book whenever they want, from any device.
product.feature3Desc: Real-time statistics, reports, and centralized management.

services.title: Your Digital Journey
services.subtitle: Each step brings you closer to more efficient medical management. Follow the path to digital transformation.

step1.title: Digital Consulting
step1.description: We analyze your practice's needs and design a personalized digital transformation strategy.

step2.title: Appointment Management
step2.description: We implement TurnosMedicos to automate your schedule and improve patient communication.

step3.title: Digital Medical Records
step3.description: We digitize medical records with security, complying with all health regulations.

step4.title: Integrations
step4.description: We connect with billing systems, insurance providers, and labs for an integrated workflow.

step5.title: Continuous Support
step5.description: We accompany you with continuous training, updates, and personalized technical support.

pricing.title: Plans that Grow with You
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your practice's stage. You can always scale when you need it.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect to start your digital journey

about.label: Our Story
about.title: Pioneers in Argentine Digital Health
about.description: Since 2018, we have accompanied hundreds of healthcare professionals in their digital transformation. Each practice has its own story, and we are part of it.
about.milestone1Desc: We started with the vision to modernize healthcare

contact.title: Start Your Transformation
contact.subtitle: We're ready to accompany you every step of the way. Contact us and start your digital journey today.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your practice and how we can help you...

footer.description: Digital solutions for healthcare professionals in Argentina. We transform the way you manage your practice.
